scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up postgres redis qdrant
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n api,ai,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @marketplace/web && npm run build --workspace @marketplace/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @marketplace/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @marketplace/api
